'''Tashna Sylo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the spouse of [[Griggen Sylo]]. The two owned a large [[Farm/Legends|farm]] in the outback<ref name="DB" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] in the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], a farm that had been in the [[Sylo family]] for ten generations. In order to supply a larder to feed their family of seven children and to sell offworld, the couple worked hard to harvest [[tritacale]] and [[yot bean]]s.<ref name="DB" /> Between the years [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] and [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]],<ref name="DB1">Paxi Sylo's [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry states that Paxi was nine [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old when he witnessed the [[Battle of Dantooine (Clone Wars)|battle on Dantooine]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in [[21 BBY/Legends|21.66 BBY]]. Therefore, this article assumes Paxi's year of [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] to be either [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] or [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], nine years earlier depending on which [[Standard month/Legends|month]] he was born.</ref> the youngest of the Sylo children, [[Paxi Sylo|Paxi]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]. By the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="DB" /> which [[Declaration of a New Order|formed]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> the Sylo farm had been abandoned.<ref name="DB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tashna Sylo was mentioned as one of the parents of Paxi Sylo in the latter's [[Databank (original)|original Databank]] entry on [[StarWars.com]], first posted in [[2004]].<ref name="DB" />
